channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Netanyahu to visit Trump at White House, attend 'dear friend' Lindsey Graham's memorial service
item.description: Benjamin Netanyahu will meet President Trump and attend Lindsey Graham's memorial service in Washington as U.S.-Israel operations against Iran continu...

item.title: Trump Backed Darline Graham to Preserve Ally's Legacy, Report Says
item.description: President Donald Trump backed Sen. Darline Graham's bid for a full Senate term in South Carolina because he viewed her as the best candidate to contin...

item.title: Second lady Usha Vance shares family photos featuring newborn who is less than 1 week old
item.description: Usha Vance shared the first family photo with all four children, including newborn Alec Neel Vance, joking about the challenge of a decent shot.

item.title: Bombshell memo shows Biden planned to leave Trump with even more massive immigration crisis
item.description: Sen. Eric Schmitt obtained a Biden White House memo revealing plans to expand TPS to over 3.1 million noncitizens in the administration's final days.
